text: Healthcare: Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY. World's largest health insurance scheme. ₹5 lakh/family/year for hospitalization. 55 crore beneficiaries (12 crore families). 1,949 medical packages. 28,000+ empaneled hospitals. 7.5 crore treatments provided.

Healthcare: PM National Dialysis Programme. Free dialysis for BPL patients at 920 district hospitals. PPP model. 1.5+ crore dialysis sessions provided. Addresses chronic kidney disease burden disproportionately affecting poor.

Healthcare: PM ABHIM (Ayushman Bharat Health Infrastructure Mission). ₹64,180 crore. Strengthens primary, secondary, tertiary care. 11,024 Health and Wellness Centres upgraded. Integrated Public Health Labs in 730 districts. Pandemic preparedness.

Healthcare: Janani Suraksha Yojana. Cash incentive for institutional delivery. ₹1,400 per delivery (rural), ₹1,000 (urban). 1.1 crore beneficiaries annually. Reduced maternal mortality from 167 to 97 per lakh live births.

Healthcare: National Health Mission (NHM). ₹36,785 crore FY24. Covers Rural & Urban Health Missions. ASHA workers: 10.4 lakh. 1,65,000 Health & Wellness Centres. Immunization: 95% coverage. TB elimination target: 2025.

Healthcare: COVID-19 Vaccination and CoWIN platform. 220 crore+ doses administered. World's largest vaccination drive. Both Covishield and Covaxin (indigenous). CoWIN platform managed 4 billion+ transactions. Vaccine Maitri: 30+ country exports.
